conversations.content:
Hi, I want to try two restaurants in Paris today. For lunch, please recommend some restaurants that serves French cuisine, find the one with the highest rating.
For dinner, I want to try a restaurant which serves Chinese cuisine, and find the one with the highest rating.
Tell me how much it costs to eat at each restaurant.

<function_thought>
To fulfill your request, I need to start by gathering a list of restaurants in Paris. Once I have the list, I can filter out the French and Chinese cuisine restaurants and find their ratings. Finally, I will check the cost of eating at each of the selected restaurants. The trajectory will begin with retrieving all restaurants in Paris.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_all_restaurants_in_city(city="Paris")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

Restaurant in Paris: New Israeli Restaurant
Breizh Café
New Asiaway
Le Baratin
Bistrot Paul Bert
Royal Panda
The yard
China Garden
Miznon
Chez L'Ami Jean
